formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense benefit equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus all adjustments and working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Losses on investments in non-affiliates - Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost - Other - Accounts receivable + Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash provided by used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Investments in non-affiliates and other, net
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments in non-affiliates and other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities

formulas.formula: Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
components: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period + Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Oct 29 2023)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 29 2023)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.note: From the 9M equity statement: Net income 17475 minus dividends 296 minus share repurchases charged to retained earnings 6990 equals 10189. Beginning RE 10171 plus 10189 equals 20360 ending RE. XBRL StockRepurchasedAndRetiredDuringPeriodValue on RetainedEarnings member for 9M = 6990.

operating_leases.current_location: Current operating lease liability of 230 is included within Accrued and other current liabilities on the balance sheet face. It is explicitly broken out in Note 10 balance sheet components table under the line item Operating leases within Accrued and Other Current Liabilities, and also in the Note 3 lease maturity table as Less short-term operating lease liabilities. XBRL tag us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent = 230 at 2023-10-29.

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement shows a single Depreciation and amortization line of 1121 for 9M FY2024. Separately, amortization of intangible assets was 471 for 9M FY2024 per Note 9. The 1121 total includes both depreciation of PP&E and amortization of intangibles.

accounts_payable.note: Balance sheet shows Accounts payable as a separate line at 2380 as of Oct 29 2023. XBRL concept us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent = 2380. No combination with accrued liabilities.

accounts_receivable.note: Balance sheet shows Accounts receivable, net as a separate line at 8309. XBRL concept us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent = 8309. Note 10 indicates two customers each accounted for 11% of AR balance.

capex.note: CF line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets = 815 for 9M FY2024 using XBRL concept us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets. Also separately, Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets of 44 in financing activities represent financed PP&E payments. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid was found.

acquisitions.note: CF line Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = 83 for 9M FY2024. Note 9 states goodwill increased by 58 from an acquisition in the first nine months of FY2024.

components.label: Short-term debt (0.584% Notes Due 2024 current portion)

short_term_debt.note: Balance sheet line Short-term debt = 1249 at Oct 29 2023. XBRL DebtCurrent = 1249. This represents the current portion of the 0.584% Notes Due 2024. The 0.309% Notes Due 2023 were repaid in June 2023. No commercial paper was outstanding.

sbc.note: CF addback for SBC = 2555 for 9M FY2024. Note 4 provides breakdown by function: COR 96, RD 1826, SGA 633 totaling 2555. These are net of amounts allocated to inventory.

interest_expense.source: Interest expense of 194 and Interest income of 572 are both shown as separate line items on the income statement for the 9M FY2024 period. No further gross vs net split needed as both are separately presented. XBRL: us-gaap:InterestExpense = 194 and us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = 572.

tax_rate.note: 9M FY2024: Income tax expense 2237, pretax income 19712, effective rate 11.35% (disclosed as 11.3% in the filing). Both pretax income and tax expense are positive. No flags needed.

inventory.note: Note 10 inventory table discloses breakdown at Oct 29 2023: Raw materials 1663, Work in-process 1338, Finished goods 1778, Total 4779. XBRL tags: InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves, InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves.

items_corrected: Losses on investments in non-affiliates: sign corrected from -24 to +24 (loss is an add-back to net income)
Other: sign corrected from +170 to -170 (OtherNoncashIncomeExpense shown in parentheses in filing indicating negative value)

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net
Operating income plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense benefit equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus all adjustments and working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash provided by used in investing activities
Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
